operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Model defines sorter legs and site-specific leg counts
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the Sorter Model defines sorter legs. It also provides site-specific context that Haslet has 4 legs and McKinney has 2.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / Sorter Model'
Text: 'The Sorter Model define our sorter legs.'
Text: 'At Haslet we have 4 legs and only 2 at McKinney.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Sorter Model defines sorter legs. Haslet has 4 legs and McKinney has 2 legs.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Model field: Name represents side ordering from RMS map
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Name field identifies the side, and the slide says the ordering follows the RMS map from top to bottom.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Name: of the side. From RMS map we go from top to bottom.'

relationships.target: RMS map ordering from top to bottom

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Model Name field identifies the side and follows RMS map ordering from top to bottom.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Model field: XleIp is the receiver IP address used for sorter messages
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The XleIp field stores the receiver IP address used when messages are sent to the sorter.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'XleIp: Receiver Ip address when we send messages to the sorter.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Model XleIp field is the receiver IP address used when sending messages to the sorter.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Model field: XleName is the receiver name used for sorter messages
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The XleName field stores the receiver name used when messages are sent to the sorter.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'XleName: Receiver name when we send messages to the sorter.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Model XleName field is the receiver name used when sending messages to the sorter.
